🤖 Coins.me SIP Streak Bot 💹
This bot tracks your daily cbBTC SIP streak on Base and rewards you with badges.  
Swap daily → grow your streak → climb the leaderboard!

Here’s what you can do 👇

1️⃣ /setwallet 0xyourAddress
   Link your Coins.me wallet address.
   You only need to do this once.
   Example: /setwallet 0xabc123...def

2️⃣ /streak
   Submit/check today's streak.
   • If you swapped to cbBTC today → your streak goes up 🔥  
   • If not → bot tells you to complete your daily SIP first.

3️⃣ /leaderboard
   Shows Top 10 users by current streak in this group.
   • See who is on fire right now 🔥  
   • Medals for top 3 and streak badges for everyone.

4️⃣ /rank
   Shows Top 10 users by total active days (lifetime submissions).
   • Great for consistency kings/queens 👑  
   • You’ll also see your total-days rank and badge.

5️⃣ /profile
   Shows your own Coins.me SIP profile:
   • Linked wallet (short)  
   • Current streak  
   • Total active days  
   • Streak & activity badges  

6️⃣ /streakbadges  
   Shows all streak level badges and criteria.

7️⃣ /milestones 
   Shows milestone badges unlocked at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100 & 365 days.


 8️⃣/allcommands
   Shows this help menu anytime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🌟 How streak works  
• Do at least one swap to cbBTC on Base via Coins.me per day  
• Bot checks onchain to verify your swap  
• Streak increases on consecutive days  
• Miss a day → streak resets to 1  
• Milestone badges at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100, 365+ days 🎖️

🔥 Stay consistent. Swap daily. Level up your streak.  
💹 Build your SIP discipline with Coins.me!

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

🚨 Fraud Update @everyone 🚨

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

This proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. Expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 Fraud evolves, but so do we. Together, P2P.me stays the safest P2P network.

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

q: /coins
a:
Coins.me is a gas-free, fee-free decentralized exchange (DEX) that allows anyone to buy, sell, and swap crypto instantly using fiat in supported countries (India, Indonesia, and Brazil) or swap tokens globally.

It combines the simplicity of a CEX with the trustlessness of DeFi, built entirely on-chain and powered by the P2P.me protocol.

Key Highlights:
Non-custodial: You hold your own keys.
Gasless swaps.
Instant on/off-ramp for fiat (in supported countries).
Creates a Smart contract wallets (login with Google, phone, or passkey). So no connecting wallets, no need to sign multiple transactions or allowances everytime.
ZK-KYC for higher limits and privacy. (Applies only on Ramps, not Swaps)
Built on Base chain with Uniswap V3 routing.
Backed by the same on-chain architecture as P2P.me.

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

q:
/spread

maily because of supply & demand
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

During the day (9 AM to 12 midnight), most orders are fulfilled in under 2 minutes due to higher merchant availability."

q: /spread
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

🚨 Fraud Update @everyone 🚨

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

This proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. Expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 Fraud evolves, but so do we. Together, P2P.me stays the safest P2P network.

q: so you mean scan & pay is safe?
a:
If we pay to the shopkeeper .. if an amount is fraudulent, money trail typically ends at the merchant level due to this fragmentation. 

For shopkeepers or vendors receiving payments through legitimate merchant current accounts, any impact is minimal and can usually be resolved by submitting a simple affidavit to the bank or cybercrime authorities.

P2P.me also provides refunds and  free legal support in such cases to ensure smooth resolution.

/rpslash

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

q: /spread is 5 to 7% . and price is fixed based on supply and demand.
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

a:
How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

/Rpslash

🚨 Fraud Update @everyone 🚨

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

This proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. Expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 Fraud evolves, but so do we. Together, P2P.me stays the safest P2P network.

🤖 Coins.me SIP Streak Bot 💹
This bot tracks your daily cbBTC SIP streak on Base and rewards you with badges.  
Swap daily → grow your streak → climb the leaderboard!

Here’s what you can do 👇

1️⃣ /setwallet 0xyourAddress
   Link your Coins.me wallet address.
   You only need to do this once.
   Example: /setwallet 0xabc123...def

2️⃣ /streak
   Submit/check today's streak.
   • If you swapped to cbBTC today → your streak goes up 🔥  
   • If not → bot tells you to complete your daily SIP first.

3️⃣ /leaderboard
   Shows Top 10 users by current streak in this group.
   • See who is on fire right now 🔥  
   • Medals for top 3 and streak badges for everyone.

4️⃣ /rank
   Shows Top 10 users by total active days (lifetime submissions).
   • Great for consistency kings/queens 👑  
   • You’ll also see your total-days rank and badge.

5️⃣ /profile
   Shows your own Coins.me SIP profile:
   • Linked wallet (short)  
   • Current streak  
   • Total active days  
   • Streak & activity badges  

6️⃣ /streakbadges  
   Shows all streak level badges and criteria.

7️⃣ /milestones 
   Shows milestone badges unlocked at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100 & 365 days.


 8️⃣/allcommands
   Shows this help menu anytime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🌟 How streak works  
• Do at least one swap to cbBTC on Base via Coins.me per day  
• Bot checks onchain to verify your swap  
• Streak increases on consecutive days  
• Miss a day → streak resets to 1  
• Milestone badges at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100, 365+ days 🎖️

🔥 Stay consistent. Swap daily. Level up your streak.  
💹 Build your SIP discipline with Coins.me!

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.

We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

/rpslash

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

q: /spread
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

q: yes , coins.me powered by p2p.me /coins
a:
Coins.me is a gas-free, fee-free decentralized exchange (DEX) that allows anyone to buy, sell, and swap crypto instantly using fiat in supported countries (India, Indonesia, and Brazil) or swap tokens globally.

It combines the simplicity of a CEX with the trustlessness of DeFi, built entirely on-chain and powered by the P2P.me protocol.

Key Highlights:
Non-custodial: You hold your own keys.
Gasless swaps.
Instant on/off-ramp for fiat (in supported countries).
Creates a Smart contract wallets (login with Google, phone, or passkey). So no connecting wallets, no need to sign multiple transactions or allowances everytime.
ZK-KYC for higher limits and privacy. (Applies only on Ramps, not Swaps)
Built on Base chain with Uniswap V3 routing.
Backed by the same on-chain architecture as P2P.me.

a:
🤖 Coins.me SIP Streak Bot 💹
This bot tracks your daily cbBTC SIP streak on Base and rewards you with badges.  
Swap daily → grow your streak → climb the leaderboard!

Here’s what you can do 👇

1️⃣ /setwallet 0xyourAddress
   Link your Coins.me wallet address.
   You only need to do this once.
   Example: /setwallet 0xabc123...def

2️⃣ /streak
   Submit/check today's streak.
   • If you swapped to cbBTC today → your streak goes up 🔥  
   • If not → bot tells you to complete your daily SIP first.

3️⃣ /leaderboard
   Shows Top 10 users by current streak in this group.
   • See who is on fire right now 🔥  
   • Medals for top 3 and streak badges for everyone.

4️⃣ /rank
   Shows Top 10 users by total active days (lifetime submissions).
   • Great for consistency kings/queens 👑  
   • You’ll also see your total-days rank and badge.

5️⃣ /profile
   Shows your own Coins.me SIP profile:
   • Linked wallet (short)  
   • Current streak  
   • Total active days  
   • Streak & activity badges  

6️⃣ /streakbadges  
   Shows all streak level badges and criteria.

7️⃣ /milestones 
   Shows milestone badges unlocked at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100 & 365 days.


 8️⃣/allcommands
   Shows this help menu anytime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🌟 How streak works  
• Do at least one swap to cbBTC on Base via Coins.me per day  
• Bot checks onchain to verify your swap  
• Streak increases on consecutive days  
• Miss a day → streak resets to 1  
• Milestone badges at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100, 365+ days 🎖️

🔥 Stay consistent. Swap daily. Level up your streak.  
💹 Build your SIP discipline with Coins.me!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.

We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

q: /protect
a:
How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

a:
How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

q: /protect
a:
How does P2P.me protect you from account freeze fraud?

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.
✅ Over 25,000 transactions — zero freeze incidents.
We provide Good support & legal help as well 🫡

2️⃣ Second-degree protection:

Use a separate bank account for your P2P offramps.
Don’t mix it with your main account!

💡 It’s super easy to open a new account with Jio Payments Bank or Airtel Payments Bank in India.

3️⃣Third-degree protection:

Even if your account is frozen, our legal experts will help you unfreeze it — for free!

q: /spread , also price is fixed based on supply and demand .
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

q:
it depends on supply & demand
/spread
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

This proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. Expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 Fraud evolves, but so do we. Together, P2P.me stays the safest P2P network.

a:
🤖 Coins.me SIP Streak Bot 💹
This bot tracks your daily cbBTC SIP streak on Base and rewards you with badges.  
Swap daily → grow your streak → climb the leaderboard!

Here’s what you can do 👇

1️⃣ /setwallet 0xyourAddress
   Link your Coins.me wallet address.
   You only need to do this once.
   Example: /setwallet 0xabc123...def

2️⃣ /streak
   Submit/check today's streak.
   • If you swapped to cbBTC today → your streak goes up 🔥  
   • If not → bot tells you to complete your daily SIP first.

3️⃣ /leaderboard
   Shows Top 10 users by current streak in this group.
   • See who is on fire right now 🔥  
   • Medals for top 3 and streak badges for everyone.

4️⃣ /rank
   Shows Top 10 users by total active days (lifetime submissions).
   • Great for consistency kings/queens 👑  
   • You’ll also see your total-days rank and badge.

5️⃣ /profile
   Shows your own Coins.me SIP profile:
   • Linked wallet (short)  
   • Current streak  
   • Total active days  
   • Streak & activity badges  

6️⃣ /streakbadges  
   Shows all streak level badges and criteria.

7️⃣ /milestones 
   Shows milestone badges unlocked at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100 & 365 days.


 8️⃣/allcommands
   Shows this help menu anytime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🌟 How streak works  
• Do at least one swap to cbBTC on Base via Coins.me per day  
• Bot checks onchain to verify your swap  
• Streak increases on consecutive days  
• Miss a day → streak resets to 1  
• Milestone badges at 3, 7, 15, 30, 60, 100, 365+ days 🎖️

🔥 Stay consistent. Swap daily. Level up your streak.  
💹 Build your SIP discipline with Coins.me!

swap between other assets available on base
/coins
a:
Coins.me is a gas-free, fee-free decentralized exchange (DEX) that allows anyone to buy, sell, and swap crypto instantly using fiat in supported countries (India, Indonesia, and Brazil) or swap tokens globally.

It combines the simplicity of a CEX with the trustlessness of DeFi, built entirely on-chain and powered by the P2P.me protocol.

Key Highlights:
Non-custodial: You hold your own keys.
Gasless swaps.
Instant on/off-ramp for fiat (in supported countries).
Creates a Smart contract wallets (login with Google, phone, or passkey). So no connecting wallets, no need to sign multiple transactions or allowances everytime.
ZK-KYC for higher limits and privacy. (Applies only on Ramps, not Swaps)
Built on Base chain with Uniswap V3 routing.
Backed by the same on-chain architecture as P2P.me.

/Rpslash

🚨 Fraud Update @everyone 🚨

P2P.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

Here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 Only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-KYC
🔹 Some scammers buy social media accts + IDs to sneak in
🔹 Our new Fraud Engine now runs 24/7

It tracks:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ Live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ We process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ This makes us even stronger going forward

This proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. Expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

q: /spread 5 to 7% now and also p2p.me  price is fixed based on supply and demand.
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

q: /spread
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

q:
/spread 
we are understanding. 
but now spread is 5 to 7% . spread goes to ,  each orders merchant commission is 2% , insurance on merchants and users , gas fees , campaign reward , protocol revenue, etc
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

1️⃣ First-degree protection:

Our ZK-Social Verification system blocks fraudsters from ever using our protocol.

/rpslash

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

🚨 Fraud Update @everyone 🚨

P2P.me bahut fast grow kar raha hai, aur scale badhne ke saath kuch bad actors fraud funds funnel karne ki koshish kar rahe hain—jis wajah se kuch accounts freeze hue hain.

Yeh hai hum kaise fight kar rahe hain 👇

🔹 Sirf micro-transactions ($1–$400) zk-KYC ke through
🔹 Kuch scammers social media accounts + IDs kharid ke system me ghusne ki koshish karte hain
🔹 Hamara naya Fraud Engine ab 24/7 run karta hai

Yeh track karta hai:

* Suspicious fund flows
* Erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* Fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ 1 week se live hai aur real-time me bad actors pakad raha hai
✅ Hum daily 1500+ orders process karte hain aur fraud rate < 1 in 10,000 hai
✅ Isse hamara system aur strong ban raha hai aage ke liye

Yeh prove karta hai ki decentralized, privacy-first networks bhi scale par fraud se lad sakte hain. Jaldi hi hum ise open-source karne wale hain. 🌍

💪 Fraud evolve hota rehta hai, lekin hum bhi evolve ho rahe hain. Saath milkar, P2P.me sabse safe P2P network bana rahe hain.

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups 
* ......etc ,...

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.

q: /coins
a:
Coins.me is a gas-free, fee-free decentralized exchange (DEX) that allows anyone to buy, sell, and swap crypto instantly using fiat in supported countries (India, Indonesia, and Brazil) or swap tokens globally.

It combines the simplicity of a CEX with the trustlessness of DeFi, built entirely on-chain and powered by the P2P.me protocol.

Key Highlights:
Non-custodial: You hold your own keys.
Gasless swaps.
Instant on/off-ramp for fiat (in supported countries).
Creates a Smart contract wallets (login with Google, phone, or passkey). So no connecting wallets, no need to sign multiple transactions or allowances everytime.
ZK-KYC for higher limits and privacy. (Applies only on Ramps, not Swaps)
Built on Base chain with Uniswap V3 routing.
Backed by the same on-chain architecture as P2P.me.

q: haan.  spread also there . so gap on buy and sell price . /spread now 5 to 7 %
a:
Except for the difference between our buy and sell rates, we do not charge any additional fees.

If we reduce the buy price beyond a certain level, funds from other P2P platforms start flowing into our system due to arbitrage trading. This increases the risk of account freezes and fraud, which is why we cannot lower the buy price further.

We are also increasing the spread from 3% to 5% to manage the high seller demand and rebalance the supply dynamics.

For more details - https://t.me/P2Pdotme/16437/98012

🚨 fraud update @everyone 🚨

p2p.me is growing fast, and with scale we’ve seen some bad actors try funneling fraud funds—causing a few account freezes.

here’s how we’re fighting back 👇

🔹 only micro-transactions (\$1–\$400) via zk-kyc
🔹 some scammers buy social media accts + ids to sneak in
🔹 our new fraud engine now runs 24/7

it tracks:

* suspicious fund flows
* erratic activity (cancels, delays, spikes)
* fake / unusual sign-ups

✅ live for 1 week & catching bad actors real-time
✅ we process 1500+ orders daily with fraud at <1 in 10,000
✅ this makes us even stronger going forward

this proves decentralized, privacy-first networks can still fight fraud at scale. expect us to open-source this soon. 🌍

💪 fraud evolves, but so do we. together, p2p.me stays the safest p2p network.
